name: Story Circle
description: Dan Harmon's simplified Hero's Journey. Eight steps that form a circle of change.

beats.name: You (Comfort Zone)
beats.prompt: Establish your protagonist in their comfort zone. Who are they? What's their ordinary world?

beats.name: Need (Desire)
beats.prompt: What does your protagonist want or need? This desire will drive them forward.

beats.name: Go (Unfamiliar Situation)
beats.prompt: Your protagonist enters an unfamiliar situation. They cross a threshold into a new world.

beats.name: Search (Adapt)
beats.prompt: They adapt to the new situation, facing challenges and learning. What struggles do they face?

beats.name: Find (Get What They Wanted)
beats.prompt: They get what they wanted—but at what cost? This is often a hollow victory.

beats.name: Take (Pay the Price)
beats.prompt: They pay a heavy price for what they got. What do they lose or sacrifice?

beats.name: Return (Go Back)
beats.prompt: They return to their familiar situation, but they're not the same person.

beats.name: Change (Having Changed)
beats.prompt: They've changed. How are they different? How does this affect their world?
